raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing check-in","name":"What's been most useful for you in week two, Riley?","description":"Opens with a calm read on what is helping him settle in without implying trouble.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team map","name":"Who have you had the most useful direct conversations with so far?","description":"Surfaces whether he is building real team context beyond docs and async notes.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership edges","name":"Where are the ownership boundaries still fuzzy for you, Riley?","description":"Finds the places where scope and decision rights are still not fully mapped.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Context sources","name":"When you need context before making a code decision, where do you go first?","description":"Shows whether he knows the right people and channels for architecture context.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Assumption traps","name":"What kind of situation makes you feel like you might be assuming the wrong thing?","description":"Surfaces the signals he uses to notice when his mental model may diverge from the team's reality.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Incident expectations","name":"What have you picked up so far about how incidents are handled here?","description":"Checks understanding of incident norms in a low-pressure way before pressure tests arrive.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Escalation threshold","name":"What would make you escalate something sooner rather than later?","description":"Probes his judgment for when to raise uncertainty or risk instead of carrying it alone.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support network","name":"Who should be part of your go-to support circle here?","description":"Identifies the relationships that should be intentionally built next to keep onboarding moving.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next support","name":"What would make the next two weeks easier for you?","description":"Closes by turning any missing context into a concrete support request for the next stretch.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
